headline: ADM Appoints Jeff Rowe as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer
summary: CHICAGO, July 20, 2026--ADM (NYSE: ADM) (ADM or "the Company"), a global leader in innovative solutions from nature, today announced that it has appointed Jeff Rowe to the newly created role of Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective August 17, 2026. This strategic appointment complements ADM’s leadership bench and positions the Company to further advance its growth strategy and business priorities.
